name: Symptoms delayed after work accident, still covered?
description: Yes, prove link—Utah ok if late discovery[5].

mainEntity.name: Symptoms delayed after work accident, still covered?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes, prove link—Utah ok if late discovery[5].
acceptedAnswer.description: **Yes, if medically linked to incident.** Common for backs; notice from discovery[5]. **Key factors:** No alternate cause, timely filing post-knowledge. **Practical guidance:** Track onset, get specialist opinion. Utah allows if no prejudice[5]. **File conservatively.**
